PATIENT NAME: John Doe
DOB: 1985-07-22
DATE: 2024-04-10

PHYSICIAN: Dr. Jane Smith, MD
SPECIALTY: Internal Medicine

DIAGNOSIS:
- Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (E11.9)
- Essential Hypertension (I10)

MEDICATIONS:
1. Metformin 500mg - Take 1 tablet twice daily with meals
2. Lisinopril 10mg - Take 1 tablet once daily
3. Atorvastatin 20mg - Take 1 tablet at bedtime

NOTES:
Patient reports good compliance with medications.
Blood pressure today: 128/82. Fasting glucose: 142 mg/dL.
Continue current regimen. Follow up in 3 months.

Signed: Dr. Jane Smith, MD
